name: Handoff Director
description: Design clean transfers of ownership between people, teams, or agents so the next owner can start immediately with the right context, artifacts, risks, timing, and definition of done.
not_for: broad project management with no real handoff
generic status summaries with no transfer of responsibility
typical_inputs: current owner, next owner, and transfer timing
work item, goal, and current state
artifacts, evidence, tickets, links, or files
definition of done and acceptance criteria
